text.title: content-audit-process Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for content-audit-process as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Running a large audit (1000+ pages) in one pass without chunking.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Large audits produce spreadsheets too large for a single agent context window; chunking is required. Also, large audits overwhelm stakeholders; smaller, focused audits per content type are easier to action.

failure-mode.description: Archive removed content to the trash without staging; broken inbound links surface within days, forcing emergency recovery.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Stage removed content to a holding environment first. Broken link patterns surface within 24–48 hours; if they are acceptable, then permanently delete. If not, restore without restoring all 1000 items.
